历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for this subject category were approximately 1118, 1578, 2260, 1596, and 1917 respectively. Overall, there is a backward trend, with continuous decline from 2021 to 2023, a brief recovery to 1596 in 2024, and then a further backward shift to 1917 in 2025. In the past 3 years, the cumulative backward shift is about 341 places, with a baseline ranking of approximately 1917 in 2025. The enrollment plan for Tongji University in Guangxi Physics Category (including former Science Category) was: 116 in 2021, 116 in 2022, 116 in 2023, 110 in 2024, and 118 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 120, a slight expansion of about 1.7% compared to 2025, which is limited and has a minor impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tongji University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it ranks 18th (Top 20), with stable rankings in the 14–18 range in recent years, placing it among the top domestic universities. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents (paper data fabrication, dean dismissal, etc.), which may have a certain inhibitory effect on some candidates' application psychology. Douyin popularity ranks 26th (relatively hot), and it was ranked 3rd (very hot) in 2021, with overall high attention but a decline in recent years. In 2022, there was a clear signal of enrollment gap (Henan), and in 2025, there were abnormal admission score records, but these were incidents in other provinces, with limited impact on Guangxi. Civil Engineering A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Management Science and Engineering A+, Urban and Rural Planning A+, Architecture A, etc., with more than 15 disciplines rated A- or above, indicating extremely strong disciplinary strength. The engineering experimental classes (Civil Engineering School, Environmental School, Electronic Information School, Computer School, etc.) in the enrollment majors highly correspond to the above advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering have high social popularity, matching Tongji University's information and electronic information school enrollment directions. Civil engineering and architecture majors have social popularity that is clearly discouraged/differentiated and wait-and-see, which may exert downward pressure on the popularity of civil engineering-related majors. In 2026, the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Guangxi is about 392,000. Based on the recent proportion of Physics Category candidates at about 66%, the number of Physics Category candidates is about 259,000, roughly the same as in 2025 (260,000). Tongji University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city, which has a strong regional attraction for Guangxi candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Guangxi is about 2.2% (2025), which is moderately low, indicating it is not a major source province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical backward trend in rankings, the slight expansion in the 2026 plan (+1.7%), the basically stable total number of candidates in Guangxi, the somewhat negative reputation but extremely high level of the university, and the outstanding strength of advantageous disciplines, based on the 2025 baseline of 1917. Given the very small expansion and stable candidate numbers, no additional correction is made. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1937, with a range of 1743–2131.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 1743–2131, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, Tier 1 majors as a sprint (Guohao Elite Class, Excellence Plan Class, Computer School, etc., have higher ranking requirements), and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 1700), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors. Tongji University's engineering strength is extremely prominent, with Civil Engineering, Environmental Science, Management, Architecture, etc., all being A+ disciplines, but civil engineering and architecture majors have low social popularity. When applying, you need to comprehensively consider personal interests and employment expectations.
